
 
 
## *************particleSwarm-volume multiple5-mean: resultFile50multiple5*************** ##

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
fig = plt.figure()
ax = fig.add_subplot(111, projection='3d')
p = 0.2
SNR = 15
N = 50
f = 10
bounds = np.array([[-1000, -1000, -300, -300, -300, -300, -300],[1000, 1000, 300, 300, 300, 300, 300]])
optimization_options = {'swarm_size': 400, 'c1': 1.5, 'c2': 2, 'w': 0.1, 'k': 80, 'p': 2, 'niter': 1000, 'ftol': 0.001, 'ftol_iter': 20}
Energy = 0.037661298297290494

plt.show()


#Finished in 652.01 minutes
 
 
## *************adam-volume multiple5-mean: resultFile50multiple5*************** ##

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
fig = plt.figure()
ax = fig.add_subplot(111, projection='3d')
p = 0.2
SNR = 15
N = 50
f = 10

#Finished in 296.94 minutes
